tool_call.name: vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts :/function calculate/ :.print " Print the line containing the pattern :-5,+5print " Print 5 lines before and after

tool_call.name: vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts gg " Go to first line O " Open line above and enter insert mode import { useState } from 'react'; import { useEffect } from 'react'; \x1b :w :%print " Verify the changes

tool_call.name: vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts G " Go to last line o " Open line below and enter insert mode export const VERSION = '1.0.0'; export const API_BASE = 'https://api.example.com'; \x1b :w

tool_call.name: vim_edit
vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts :/^export const config/ " Find the line with config export o " Open line below // New configuration options debug: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development', retryAttempts: 3, \x1b :w

tool_call.name: vim_edit
vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts :%s/var/const/g " Replace all 'var' with 'const' :w :%print " Verify changes

tool_call.name: vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts :/function start/ " Find start function ma " Set mark a :/function end/ " Find end function mb " Set mark b :'a,'bs/private/public/g " Replace between marks :w

tool_call.name: vim_edit
tool_call.commands: :e src/index.ts :g/console\.log/d " Delete all lines with console.log :w

tool_call.name: vim_edit
vim_edit
